title: Language Change  - Tab when the internet is off
scenario: Language tab in Device Settings is greyed out and shows "Feature unavailable" dialog when internet is offline
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the device is connected to a Poly Bluetooth audio device.
4. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. Verify that the device's internet connection is turned OFF (e.g., Airplane Mode or Wi-Fi/Data disabled).
6. Observe the 'Language' tab under Device Settings — it should appear greyed out.
9. Tap the 'Ok got it' button on the dialog.
expected: The 'Language' tab should be greyed out when there is no internet connection. Tapping it should show a dialog: 'Feature unavailable. An internet connection is required to access this feature.' with an 'Ok got it' button. Tapping the button should close the dialog and return to the greyed-out 'Language' tab state.
